svg.title: Sentinel API Gateway Architecture
svg.desc: Full architecture diagram showing client request flow through rate limiter, JWT filter, controllers, Redis, PostgreSQL, Prometheus and Grafana

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What kind of clients call the Sentinel API gateway?')
sendPrompt('How does the sliding window rate limiter work in Sentinel?')
sendPrompt('How does the JWT auth filter validate tokens in Sentinel?')
sendPrompt('What does the request logging filter save to the database?')
sendPrompt('What endpoints does AuthController expose in Sentinel?')
sendPrompt('What does the analytics API return in Sentinel?')
sendPrompt('What does the gateway proxy controller do?')
sendPrompt('What does AuthService do in Sentinel?')
sendPrompt('How does TokenService generate and validate JWTs?')
sendPrompt('How does the sliding window algorithm work in Redis?')
sendPrompt('What tables does Sentinel store in PostgreSQL?')
sendPrompt('What data does Sentinel store in Redis?')
sendPrompt('What do the Flyway migrations do in Sentinel?')
sendPrompt('What metrics does Spring Actuator expose in Sentinel?')
sendPrompt('How does Prometheus scrape Sentinel metrics?')
sendPrompt('What does the Grafana dashboard show for Sentinel?')

svg.text: :8080 Spring Boot • :5432 PostgreSQL • :6379 Redis • :9090 Prometheus • :3000 Grafana
